title: BEL Project Engineer-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: The latest Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Project Engineer-I posts! Published under Advt. No. 6050/HR (SC&US)/PE/2026 at BEL Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 4 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum 32 years age group and possessing B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc Engineering (4-year course) qualification can apply offline up to 16 June 2026. Find all details about the BEL Project Engineer-I new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application form, and notification PDF here.

age_limit.details: Upper age limit as on 01.05.2026: 32 Years. Age relaxation is applicable as per rules: Other Backward Classes (Non Creamy Layer): 3 Years Scheduled Caste/ Scheduled Tribe: 5 Years Persons with Benchmark Disability having minimum 40% disability: 10 Years

qualification.details: Project Engineer (PE)-I: 4 Years B.E./ B.Tech/ B.Sc Engineering (4-year course) with Pass Class from a recognized University/Institution in Electronics: Electronics/Electronics & Communication/ Electronics & Telecommunication/ Communication/Telecommunication. Minimum 2 years of relevant post qualification industrial experience.

salary_details.details: Consolidated remuneration of Rs. 40,000/- per month for the 1st year, Rs. 45,000/- for 2nd year, Rs. 50,000/- for 3rd year and Rs. 55,000/- for 4th year. Additional Rs. 12,000/- per year for expenses like insurance premium, attire allowance, stitching charges, footwear allowance etc. Medical Insurance cover for Rs. 2 lakhs per annum and Life Cover Insurance for Rs. 5 lakhs per annum required. Area allowance at the rate of 10% of the consolidated remuneration for those posted outside Bengaluru. Lunch allowance of Rs. 150/- per day for those detailed on Company's work outside factory premises for 3 hours or more. Retention Bonus of Rs. 25,000/- for every completed year, total Rs. 1,00,000/- at the end of 4 years.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.bel-india.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BEL Project Engineer-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the BEL Project Engineer-I recruitment is 16th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for Project Engineer-I?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a 4-year B.E./ B.Tech/ B.Sc Engineering degree with Pass Class in Electronics or related fields from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Engineer-I position?
faq.answer: The upper age limit for Project Engineer-I is 32 years as of 01.05.2026. Age relaxations are available for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Project Engineer-I?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Project Engineer-I post in Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Engineer-I role?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 55,000/- per month, increasing annually for the four-year engagement period, along with other allowances and bonuses.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post to the given address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BEL Project Engineer-I?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for SC/ST/PwBD candidates?
faq.answer: No, SC/ST/PwBD candidates are exempted from paying the application fee for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum work experience required?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a minimum of 2 years of relevant post-qualification industrial experience to be eligible for the Project Engineer-I position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the BEL website (www.bel-india.in) under the 'Careers' section. Direct links are also provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
